case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE  PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY HENRY W. RANDALL BAIL BONDS
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE  PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY HENRY W. RANDALL BAIL BONDS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $101.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,101.00
